title: Bouncy G-Greasy British Runner Beans Hash
description: A traditional British dish featuring runner beans, perfect for a quick and easy breakfast or lunch. This recipe is kid-friendly and suitable for a sattvic diet.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the slices of bacon and cook until crispy, then remove from the pan.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for a further minute.
Add the sliced runner beans, potatoes, chilli flakes, salt and pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
If using bacon, chop into small pieces and add back into the pan.
Stir to combine and cook for a further 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
